song.title: Keep My Heart Lord
song.author: Mark Jordan
song.lyrics: [V] .E A E 1Jesus, keep me in Your eye today. 2Jesus, keep me in Your hand today. 3Jesus, keep me in Your house today. .E A D B7 1Lord Jesus, keep within my eye I pray. 2Lord Jesus, hold my hand tight lest I stray. 3Lord Jesus, let the hearth fires warm always. .B7 G#m A 1While the world grows colder 2While the world spins faster 3While the world entices .A F#m F#m7 D B7 1And the hearts of many drift away. 2And the feet of many run away. 3And erodes the mountains away . E A 1Jesus keep my heart, Lord 2Jesus keep my heart, Lord 3Jesus in Your house, Lord . E 1This day. 2Al___ways. 3I’ll stay.
